message:
fix(mux): fix single-file download race between BATCH_DATA and TRANSFER_COMPLETE

handleBatchData is async (awaits decompress), which yields control to the
event loop. During that await, handleTransferComplete can delete the transfer
from activeTransfers (non-zip single-file path). When handleBatchData resumes,
the transfer is gone and handleCompletedFile fails with "No transfer found".

Fix by saving the files reference before the async gap and re-checking the
transfer afterward. If it was deleted, fall back to saveFile() directly.
